name: Oatmeal Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine oats and butter/sour milk in a small bowl. Mix well and let stand 1 hour.
2. Sift together flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt; set aside.
3. Cream together butter and brown sugar in a mixing bowl, using an electric mixer at medium speed. Add egg; beat until light and fluffy.
4. Add dry ingredients alternately with oat mixture to creamed mixture, blending well after each addition. Spoon batter into greased 2-1/2-inch muffin pan cups, filling 2/3 full.
5. Bake in a 400 degree F. oven for 20 minutes or until golden brown. Serve hot with homemade jam or preserves.
